params.name: Guanery's Violin
params.description:
On Jan 23, 1741, Guarneri spent the last four years of his life creating the best instrument.

Guarneri made four violins at the later stage of his life, and this is one of them. For this violin, he no longer focused on details but strived for an overall harmony and pursued a freer violin-making technique. It completely got rid of Stradivarius' influence and found its own unique style. The lines of the violin became longer and straighter. They were less symmetrical and precise yet strong  and po …
